title: Jcfleury
compiled_truth: Jcfleury is an external contact at [Nyseg](companies/nyseg). Over the corpus period (2000-12-01 to 2002-02-25), Jcfleury sent 15 and received 15 emails, totalling 30 interactions. Top correspondents: [Edward Schrom](people/edward-schrom-dps) (15), [Rufrano R](people/rufrano-r-nypa) (15), [Gloehr](people/gloehr-elucem) (15), [Aadamson](people/aadamson-nycap) (15), [Nyiso Tech Exchange](people/nyiso-tech-exchange-global2000) (12).
